description: Base asset collections for each world type, populated with verified Polyhaven model assets. Buildings use procedural generation — these collections provide nature, props, furniture, and quest objects only.

medieval-fantasy.name: Medieval Fantasy Base Collection
medieval-fantasy.description: Gothic furniture, wooden props, lanterns, barrels, and nature elements for medieval fantasy worlds
medieval-fantasy.purpose: Base collection for medieval fantasy worlds

nature.description: Small deciduous tree with dense canopy

objects.description: Vintage wooden crate with rope handles
Worn wooden bucket with metal bands

textures.description: Clay roof tiles for medieval buildings

cyberpunk.name: Cyberpunk Base Collection
cyberpunk.description: Urban industrial props — street lamps, utility boxes, barrels, and tech for dystopian cityscapes

sci-fi-space.name: Sci-Fi Space Base Collection
sci-fi-space.description: Industrial and tech props for space stations and sci-fi environments
sci-fi-space.purpose: Base collection for sci-fi space worlds

textures.description: Metal plating for space station floors

post-apocalyptic.name: Post-Apocalyptic Base Collection
post-apocalyptic.description: Rusted industrial debris, survival tools, and damaged props for wasteland settings

steampunk.name: Steampunk Base Collection
steampunk.description: Victorian brass props, clockwork elements, and industrial-vintage decor

wild-west.name: Wild West Base Collection
wild-west.description: Saloon furniture, rustic props, and frontier gear for Wild West settings
wild-west.purpose: Base collection for western frontier worlds

tropical-pirate.name: Tropical Pirate Base Collection
tropical-pirate.description: Maritime props, treasure, and colonial wooden elements for island and pirate settings
tropical-pirate.purpose: Base collection for tropical pirate worlds

generic.name: Generic Default Collection
generic.description: Versatile fallback assets suitable for any world type

historical-ancient.name: Historical Ancient Base Collection
historical-ancient.description: Brass vessels, vintage lamps, and period props for ancient historical settings
historical-ancient.purpose: Base collection for ancient historical worlds

high-fantasy.name: High Fantasy Base Collection
high-fantasy.description: Epic fantasy with ornate furniture, magical ambiance, and enchanted props
high-fantasy.purpose: Base collection for high fantasy worlds

dark-fantasy.name: Dark Fantasy Base Collection
dark-fantasy.description: Grim dark fantasy with decay, shadows, and gothic elements
dark-fantasy.purpose: Base collection for dark fantasy worlds

low-fantasy.name: Low Fantasy Base Collection
low-fantasy.description: Grounded fantasy with minimal magic, realistic medieval setting
low-fantasy.purpose: Base collection for low fantasy worlds

historical-medieval.name: Historical Medieval Base Collection
historical-medieval.description: Authentic medieval European setting without fantasy elements
historical-medieval.purpose: Base collection for historically accurate medieval worlds

mythological.name: Mythological Base Collection
mythological.description: Ancient world with gods, heroes, and mythical elements from Greek, Norse, and other mythologies
mythological.purpose: Base collection for mythological worlds with gods and heroes

urban-fantasy.name: Urban Fantasy Base Collection
urban-fantasy.description: Modern urban props with hints of magic — street lamps, arcane tomes, mystical candles, and city infrastructure
urban-fantasy.purpose: Base collection for urban fantasy worlds

nature.description: Magical flowering tree blooming in city streets

historical-renaissance.name: Historical Renaissance Base Collection
historical-renaissance.description: Elegant period furniture, scholarly props, and refined decor for Renaissance settings
historical-renaissance.purpose: Base collection for Renaissance historical worlds

historical-victorian.name: Historical Victorian Base Collection
historical-victorian.description: Victorian era props — elegant furniture, industrial touches, and refined domestic items
historical-victorian.purpose: Base collection for Victorian era worlds

modern-realistic.name: Modern Realistic Base Collection
modern-realistic.description: Contemporary urban props for realistic present-day settings
modern-realistic.purpose: Base collection for modern realistic worlds

superhero.name: Superhero Base Collection
superhero.description: Modern urban environment props for superhero city settings

horror.name: Horror Base Collection
horror.description: Decrepit props and eerie atmosphere for supernatural horror settings

solarpunk.name: Solarpunk Base Collection
solarpunk.description: Lush greenery, natural materials, and sustainable tech for optimistic future settings

dieselpunk.name: Dieselpunk Base Collection
dieselpunk.description: 1920s-1950s industrial aesthetic with diesel-powered machinery and gritty urban props

metadata.note: All model asset IDs verified against Polyhaven API (models category). Building models removed — procedural buildings are used instead. Texture IDs use Polyhaven texture category.
workflow: 1. Migration script creates base collections from this JSON
2. For each collection, fetch Polyhaven assets and create VisualAsset records
3. Resolve ${polyhavenId:...} placeholders to actual asset IDs
5. When world has no collection, auto-assign matching base
6. Template system can also populate collections at runtime
